ACT.bishop_quality.name: Bishop quality
ACT.bishop_quality.description: Good vs bad bishop — high when your bishops aren't hemmed in by your own pawns.

ACT.control.name: Board control
ACT.control.description: How many squares your pieces attack — raw activity.

ACT.coordination.name: Coordination
ACT.coordination.description: How many of your pieces back each other up — force harmony.

ACT.mobility.name: Piece mobility
ACT.mobility.description: How many squares your pieces can act on — true activity, not piece count.

ACT.outpost.name: Knight outposts
ACT.outpost.description: Knights parked on unassailable squares in enemy territory.

ACT.rook_open.name: Rooks on open files
ACT.rook_open.description: Rooks standing on files unobstructed by your own pawns.

DEC.prophylaxis.name: Prophylaxis
DEC.prophylaxis.description: Restricting the opponent — quiet moves that shrink their options.

DEC.trade_discipline.name: Trade discipline
DEC.trade_discipline.description: Trading toward safety — simplifying when ahead, avoiding it when behind.

DEV.count.name: Developed minors
DEV.count.description: How many knights and bishops you've brought off their home squares.

DEV.tempo_waste.name: Tempo waste
DEV.tempo_waste.description: Lost time — early queen sorties or re-moving already-developed pieces.

DYN.initiative.name: Initiative
DYN.initiative.description: How often you dictate play — your share of forcing moves so far.

EVAL.acpl.name: Avg centipawn loss
EVAL.acpl.description: Average accuracy proxy — mean eval lost per move (lower is better).

EVAL.consistency.name: Error consistency
EVAL.consistency.description: Spread of your errors — low variance late in games is the 2700 signal.

KSF.castle.name: Castled
KSF.castle.description: Whether the king has castled to safety.

KSF.in_check.name: In check
KSF.in_check.description: Whether your king is under attack right now.

KSF.shield.name: King pawn shield
KSF.shield.description: Pawns sheltering your king from the front.

KSF.zone_pressure.name: King-zone pressure
KSF.zone_pressure.description: How heavily the enemy attacks the squares around your king (lower is safer).

MAT.balance.name: Material
MAT.balance.description: Total material each side has on the board.

MAT.hanging.name: Hanging (en prise)
MAT.hanging.description: How much of your own material is sitting undefended under attack.

MAT.swing.name: Material swing
MAT.swing.description: How much material changed hands on this move — volatility.

SPC.center_control.name: Center control
SPC.center_control.description: Pressure you exert on the four central squares.

SPC.center_occ.name: Center occupation
SPC.center_occ.description: Pawns or pieces you physically park on the four central squares.

SPC.space.name: Space
SPC.space.description: Territory you control in the opponent's half.

STR.colour_complex.name: Colour-complex control
STR.colour_complex.description: Which square colour you dominate (+ light, − dark).

STR.doubled.name: Doubled pawns
STR.doubled.description: Extra pawns stacked on the same file — they can't defend each other.

STR.islands.name: Pawn islands
STR.islands.description: How fragmented your pawns are — fewer islands is healthier.

STR.isolated.name: Isolated pawns
STR.isolated.description: Pawns with no friendly pawn beside them — chronic weaknesses.

STR.passed.name: Passed pawns
STR.passed.description: Pawns with a clear run to promotion — a major endgame asset.

STR.tension.name: Tension
STR.tension.description: Unresolved contact — pieces/pawns at once attacked by the enemy and defended.

STR.tension_hold.name: Tension holding
STR.tension_hold.description: Maturity with pawn tension — declining to resolve pawn captures reflexively.

TAC.density.name: Tactical density
TAC.density.description: How sharp the position is — the volume of forcing options on the board.

TAC.exposure.name: Exposure events
TAC.exposure.description: How often you leave material hanging — sacrifices and blunders alike.

TIM.clock.name: Clock remaining (low-water)
TIM.clock.description: Each side's remaining time on the clock; aggregated as the lowest it dropped to (time trouble).

TIM.move_time.name: Move time
TIM.move_time.description: Seconds spent on each side's most recent move (from the clock).
